sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92859" key="r(u/skomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥύσκομαι</orth>, <sense id="n92859.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">)ρύω</ref> </xr> (B). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυσμός</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυσμόω</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥυθμός, ῥυθμόω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
